questions.question: Explain the primary differences between interprocess communication (IPC) and interthread communication (ITC) in multi-threaded programming.
questions.hint: While explaining, mention the use cases of IPC and ITC.

questions.question: What is the advantage of using shared memory as a means of interprocess communication in multi-threaded programming?
A programming language supports the creation of multiple threads using a single process. Describe the benefits of this approach in terms of system resources and application development.
questions.hint: Mention the trade-offs and real-world implications
